title: From zero to 56% in two years
subtitle: Average wage premium commanded by workers with AI skills vs. comparable roles without, US.
caption: Sources: PwC 2024 Global AI Jobs Barometer (2023 data); PwC 2025 Global AI Jobs Barometer (2024 data). 2022 baseline reflects pre-GenAI period when 'AI skills' was not a tracked labor-market category.
